context: Tests whether the agent produces an executable, phase-based remediation plan with measurable targets, effort estimates, and concrete file-level changes — not a vague list of suggestions.

checklist.name: Executive summary present
checklist.description: Plan opens with current score, target score, current/target grade, priority, and top focus areas

checklist.name: Critical issues table
checklist.description: Identifies top issues referencing D3, D5, D9 by dimension number with severity and impact

checklist.name: Phase-based organisation
checklist.description: Steps are grouped into phases (e.g. Phase 1: Anti-Patterns, Phase 2: Progressive Disclosure) with per-phase targets

checklist.name: Specific file changes
checklist.description: Names exact files to create or modify (e.g. SKILL.md, references/anti-patterns.md) with content examples

checklist.name: Measurable success criteria
checklist.description: success-criteria.md defines per-dimension score targets (e.g. D3 >=12/15, D9 >=16/20)

checklist.name: S/M/L effort sizing
checklist.description: Each phase has an effort estimate (S/M/L) and approximate time in hours

checklist.name: Verification commands
checklist.description: implementation-steps.sh includes skill-auditor evaluate commands to verify each phase's impact

checklist.name: A-grade target achievable
checklist.description: The plan's projected score delta would bring the skill to >=126/140 if all phases completed
